name: mx-stocks-screener
tagline: ClawHub (105★): 基于东方财富数据库，支持通过自然语言输入筛选A港美股、基金、债券等多种资产，支持多元指标筛选，含技术面、消息面、基本面及市场情绪等，可用于全球资产速筛、跨市场监控、投资组合构建、策略回测等场景。返回结果包含数据说明及 csv 文件。Natural
verdict: Main gap: no scope-limiting language despite covering a broad, multi-market financial domain, so misfires against adjacent finance requests are plausible. It also has no version field or changelog, and installs the well-known httpx package unpinned — nothing suspicious, just no way to reproduce behavior.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body, despite covering a broad multi-market financial domain where misfire against adjacent
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision section anywhere in the body.
httpx is a well-known package from the standard PyPI registry but installed unpinned (no version), matching the rubric's 'well-known package unpinned = warning' guidance; same unpi
